name: Warm Apricot Crunch Sundaes
recipeInstructions:
Info: from Selections from Betty Crocker's Cooking for Two cook book
posted by Perry Lowell, COOKING Echo, Dec. '91
vanilla ice cream
Set oven control to broil and/or 550 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place apricots in an 8-inch oven-proof skillet or shallow baking dish.
Sprinkle sugar and cashews evenly over the apricots; dot with butter.
Broil with tops about 6 inches from heat until sugar is melted and butter is melted, about 2 minutes.
Serve immediately on ice cream.
